title: Solo Hub Account Setup
description: Minimal onboarding: create your Hub account and verify your email. Run this before any fine-tuning tutorial if you're new to Solo Hub.

check_existing_account.instruction: Do you already have a Solo Hub account at hub.getsolo.tech?

create_account.instruction: Go to hub.getsolo.tech and click Sign Up. Fill in your details and complete the profile onboarding — all fields are required before you can access anything.

on_failure.error: Stuck after signup or not redirected
on_failure.recovery: Refresh the page. If you signed up via a shared link, Hub auto-redirects back to that page after onboarding completes.

check_email_verified.instruction: Is there a verification banner at the top of Hub? (This appears if your email isn't verified yet)

verify_email.instruction: Click 'Resend Verification Email' in the banner. Check your inbox and spam folder. Click the link in the email.

on_failure.recovery: Check that your email address is correct under Settings → Profile. Try resending from the banner once more. If still nothing, contact support on Discord: discord.gg/8kR5VvATUq

tutorial_complete.instruction: Your Hub account is set up and email is verified. You now have access to billing, team features, and the full fine-tuning wizard. Ready to fine-tune?
